Package recoder.java.expression

Class Literal

java.lang.Object
recoder.java.JavaSourceElement
recoder.java.JavaProgramElement
recoder.java.expression.Literal
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable, Expression, ProgramElement, SourceElement, TerminalProgramElement, ModelElement
Direct Known Subclasses:
BooleanLiteral, CharLiteral, DoubleLiteral, EmptyMapLiteral, EmptySeqLiteral, EmptySetLiteral, ExpressionSVWrapper, FloatLiteral, IntLiteral, LongLiteral, NullLiteral, RealLiteral, RKeYMetaConstructExpression, StringLiteral
public abstract class Literal extends JavaProgramElement implements Expression, TerminalProgramElement
Literal.
